name: CCI20+ROC20
description: Requires both a positive 20-period CCI and positive 20-day ROC on QQQ to confirm a bullish regime. Holds leveraged Nasdaq only when both momentum indicators agree; falls back to T-bills on any signal breakdown.
overfit_notes: Two standard momentum indicators (CCI(20) and ROC(20)) with zero-line thresholds and AND logic — moderate tuning

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open (only on regime change)

name: CCI20+ROC20+ATR
description: Extends the CCI+ROC momentum stack with an ATR-based volatility gate on QQQ. Holds leveraged Nasdaq only when both momentum indicators are positive and short-term volatility is contained below 1.3× the 63-day average range; exits to T-bills if any condition breaks.
overfit_notes: Three combined filters (CCI(20), ROC(20), ATR(14)/ATR(63) < 1.3) with a non-standard multiplier threshold — moderate tuning

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: CCI(20) > 0 AND ROC(20) > 0 AND ATR(14) < 1.3×ATR(63): 100% TQQQ

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open (only on regime change)

name: CMO20_Regime
description: Computes a 20-day Chande Momentum Oscillator on QQQ by comparing the sum of up-moves to down-moves over the lookback. Holds leveraged Nasdaq while buying pressure dominates (CMO > 0) and switches to T-bills when momentum turns net negative.
overfit_notes: Single momentum indicator at a standard period (20) with a zero-line threshold — minimal tuning

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: CMO(20) > 0 (sum of up-moves > sum of down-moves): 100% TQQQ

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open (only on regime change)

name: Price52W_Percentile
description: Measures QQQ's current price as a percentile within its 52-week (252-day) high-low range. Holds leveraged Nasdaq when price sits in the upper half of the annual range and exits to T-bills when it falls into the lower half.
overfit_notes: Single price-position metric at a textbook lookback (252 days = 1 year) with a natural midpoint threshold — very minimal tuning

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: QQQ price percentile in 252-day range > 50%: 100% TQQQ

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open (only on regime change)

name: Aroon25_Regime
description: Manually computes a 25-period Aroon oscillator on QQQ by comparing how recently the lookback high and low were set. Holds leveraged Nasdaq when the recent high is closer in time than the recent low and switches to T-bills when trend reverses.
overfit_notes: Single textbook trend indicator at a standard period (25) with a zero-line threshold — minimal tuning

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: Aroon(25) oscillator > 0 (recent high more recent than recent low): 100% TQQQ

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open (only on regime change)

name: UpDay_Count20
description: Counts the number of positive-close days in the trailing 20 trading sessions on QQQ as a simple market breadth proxy. Holds leveraged Nasdaq when more than half the recent sessions are up-days and exits to T-bills when down-days dominate.
overfit_notes: Single breadth metric at a common lookback (20 days) with a natural majority threshold (>10 out of 20) — minimal tuning

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: Up-day count in last 20 sessions > 10: 100% TQQQ

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open (only on regime change)

name: Price126D_Percentile
description: Applies the same range-percentile logic as the 52-week variant (698) but over a 6-month (126-day) lookback. Holds leveraged Nasdaq when QQQ is in the upper half of its recent 6-month range and exits to T-bills when it falls below the midpoint.
overfit_notes: Single price-position metric at a sensible shorter lookback (126 days ≈ 6 months) with a natural midpoint threshold — minimal tuning

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: QQQ price percentile in 126-day range > 50%: 100% TQQQ

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open (only on regime change)

name: ROC20_Percentile
description: Compares QQQ's current 20-day rate of change against its rolling 63-day median ROC. Holds leveraged Nasdaq when momentum is above its recent historical median (relatively strong regime) and exits to T-bills when momentum is below average.
overfit_notes: Two lookback periods (20 and 63 days) matched to common monthly/quarterly windows; median threshold is data-derived, not hand-picked — minimal tuning

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: ROC(20) > rolling 63-day median of ROC(20): 100% TQQQ

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open (only on regime change)

name: Near20DayHigh
description: Uses proximity to the 20-day closing high as a momentum indicator on QQQ. Holds leveraged Nasdaq when price is within 3% of its recent peak (sustained upside strength) and exits to T-bills on a more significant pullback.
overfit_notes: Simple breakout metric at a common lookback (20 days); the 3% tolerance is a lightly tuned threshold — minimal tuning

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: QQQ close ≥ 20-day high × 0.97 (within 3% of peak): 100% TQQQ

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open (only on regime change)

name: Near20High_5pct
description: Identical in structure to Near20DayHigh (729) but with a wider 5% tolerance. Holds leveraged Nasdaq while QQQ is within 5% of its 20-day peak, allowing a larger retracement before switching to T-bills.
overfit_notes: Same metric as 729 with a wider tolerance (5% vs 3%); the two variants differ only in this threshold — minimal tuning overall

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: QQQ close ≥ 20-day high × 0.95 (within 5% of peak): 100% TQQQ

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open (only on regime change)

name: UpDay_Count55pct
description: Near-identical to UpDay_Count20 (705) but raises the threshold to a strict 55% majority. Holds leveraged Nasdaq when at least 11 of the last 20 sessions close up and switches to T-bills when down-days match or outnumber up-days.
overfit_notes: Same breadth metric as 705 with a marginally stricter threshold (≥11 vs >10); effectively the same trigger — minimal tuning

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: Up-day count in last 20 sessions ≥ 11 (≥55%): 100% TQQQ

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open (only on regime change)

name: RollingSharpe20
description: Computes a 20-day rolling Sharpe ratio on QQQ daily returns as a risk-adjusted momentum signal. Holds leveraged Nasdaq when the ratio is positive (mean return divided by its own standard deviation > 0) and exits to T-bills when risk-adjusted momentum turns negative.
overfit_notes: Single statistical momentum metric at a common lookback (20 days) with a natural zero threshold — minimal tuning

rules.label: Entry
rules.text: 20-day rolling Sharpe ratio > 0 (mean daily return / std dev > 0): 100% TQQQ

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open (only on regime change)
